heading: Prerequisites
body:
Before starting this tutorial, you must have the following:

- An [Create a Cluster](create-new-cluster)
  running MongoDB version 6.0.11, 7.0.2, or later.
  Ensure that your IP address (Internet Protocol address)
  is included in your Atlas project's [IP Access List](access-list).

- Access to a Google Cloud project with Vertex AI API enabled. To learn more, see
  [Google Cloud documentation](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/start/cloud-environment).
